temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In the kitchen, Ross sits on a stool, reading a letter. He looks up with a concerned expression. Joey leans over the kitchen island, watching Ross with a serious, focused gaze. (Storyline: The scene opens with Ross preparing to write a letter, setting a somber and serious tone for the upcoming conversation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, slightly hesitant. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:05) A close-up shows Ross reading the letter, which is addressed to 'Mary Angela.' He looks up at Joey, who is leaning in with a concerned expression, and begins to speak. (Storyline: Ross begins to read the letter, which is revealed to be a difficult one to write, establishing the emotional weight of the situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, strained. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:06-00:08) Joey, with a deeply concerned and empathetic expression, listens to Ross. Ross continues reading the letter, his voice filled with emotion. (Storyline: The emotional stakes are raised as Ross reveals the difficulty of the letter, and Joey's supportive presence is highlighted.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Earnest, emotional. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
